title: ASN
helpOutput:
Usage: asn [<options>] <query>

  Look up Autonomous System Number information and route validity.

Options:
  --json                   Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>      DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>      Query timeout in seconds
  --skip-route-validation  Skip RPKI route origin validation (Routinator)
  --routinator-bin=<text>  Explicit path to Routinator binary (otherwise uses
                           env, embedded binary, or PATH)
  -h, --help               Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <query>  ASN number (e.g., AS13335) or IP address
output:
{
  "ASN": "AS13335",
  "Country": "US",
  "Registry": "arin",
  "Allocated": "2010-07-14",
  "AS Name": "CLOUDFLARENET - Cloudflare, Inc., US",
  "Name": "CLOUDFLARENET",
  "Route Validation": "Not applicable (requires IP/prefix input)"
}
